source_meta.source_document: ACTIS Total Hip System and Pinnacle Acetabular Cup System Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Cementless primary total hip construct anchored to the official ACTIS stem and PINNACLE cup product pages and surgical techniques.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials support dedicated acetabular and femoral instrumentation for the ACTIS and Pinnacle total hip construct.

components.component_notes: Official ACTIS materials describe the cementless femoral stem family used in the construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe the acetabular shell family used in the construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe compatible acetabular liner options.
Official construct materials describe modular femoral head options used with the ACTIS stem and Pinnacle cup.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current source set confirms the construct and component families but this pass does not expand the full ACTIS and Pinnacle product-code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or sterile implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
